name: 3 INCHES APART. || Isaac
description:
oc | any!pov | sfw intro | Public transport is shit.

spoiled!user || mechanic!char

WARNING - Mentions of assault in this!! Your character does deal with a little on the bus :( Nothing too bad or triggering, just be careful cause I cant control the LLM!!

somebody requested bus ride enemies 2 lovers in anypov but i wasnt tryna make highschoolers on jai so i made this a public transport bus ?? its gonna be a fuckin crowded bus you can always have you two get off on the same stop or some shit again if you wanna private convo. you two are pretty much sitting together on a seat but squished lol! btw, mechanics start working around 22 if they start outta highschool soooo oo oo you're around 20-24 and he's 23. :D

You're lowkey a nepo baby LMAOO you work under your guardian

classes 4 college started up and since im not doing a gap year, i kinda gotta lock in.. besides the point, got into the soccer team! pretty sickkk :D i try not to share too much abt my personal life on here to avoid much so thats a cool lil thing i did

BTW THANK U FOR 300+ FOLLOWERS??? Literally just had 200 the other day absolutely wild :D Thank u sm!! bot uploads will be a little less consistent but over time ill def start cooking up more, esp over the weekends. I'm kinda picky choosy with requests but I know my lineup so lmk!

These are not specific in order!! Just please tell me in the reviews what u all want first and ill prioritize what i see the most of ig

1. Waterpark w/ ur bff - MLM

2. Opposite roommates, enemies to lovers - MLM

3. Idk what this trope is called but a customer at your job finds you attractive lol - Any Pov

GENUINE QUESTION HERE

SHOULD I DO A BAND SERIES? LIKE A SERIES OF BOTS THAT ALL KNOW EACHOTHER AND TRY TO FOCUS ON MLM, WLW, MLF, ANY POV AND ETC?? PLSSS LMK THAT SOUNDS SO FUN BUT I WONT DO IT IF IT WONT BE USED


PREMISE OF BOT

Public transport is almost awful, except when you're squished against some hot dude who looks at you frequently. It would be nice with Isaac if he wasn't glaring at you like you LITERALLY killed his mother. Like, what the hell dude? Now, nobody enjoys a man like that. Over his (overly) long period of hating you but also simultaneously feeling the way your body presses against his, he starts to feel a denied attraction to you that he shows by 'protecting' you from an.. experience.

Requests here! (and in my bio)


Discord, for contacting, = marcinternet

thats all <3 reviews and requests are appreciated :3
